title: American Skillet Pancake
description: A simple, fluffy pancake recipe made in a skillet. Perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, egg, and melted american butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined. Do not overmix.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the preheated skillet.
Cook the pancake for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancake and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
